# Senior UI UX Specialist Handoff Template

```text
HANDOFF_PACKET
From: Senior UI UX Specialist
To: <Senior Software Engineer | Senior Test Automation Engineer>
Task:
Context:
Decisions:
Open Questions:
Risks:
Acceptance Criteria:
Artifacts Updated:
Learning Note ID:
```

## Completion Rule
A handoff is complete only when implementation and QA can execute UX criteria without ambiguity.
